message:
fix(workspace): resolve cross-crate compile errors blocking workspace tests

- two_tier.rs: fix 4 borrow errors where span guard borrows conflict
  with mutable self calls (drop guards before run_refinement_phase)
- timestamps.rs: add missing `use chrono::Datelike` for year() in tests
- guard/lib.rs: add missing test helpers (paths_conflict, fnmatch_simple,
  contains_glob) and directory prefix check in check_path_conflicts
- reservations.rs: fix import path (crate:: → mcp_agent_mail_core::)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
